# file: myapp/users/views.py
from myapp.billing.service import check_subscription


def get_user_profile(user_id: int) -> dict:
    if not check_subscription(user_id):
        return {"error": "Subscription expired"}
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John"}


# file: myapp/orders/views.py
from myapp.billing.service import check_subscription


def create_order(user_id: int, items: list) -> dict:
    if not check_subscription(user_id):
        return {"error": "Subscription expired"}
    return {"order_id": 1, "items": items}


# file: myapp/reports/views.py
from myapp.billing.service import check_subscription


def generate_report(user_id: int) -> dict:
    if not check_subscription(user_id):
        return {"error": "Subscription expired"}
    return {"report": "data"}


# file: myapp/billing/service.py
def check_subscription(user_id: int) -> bool:
    return True
